title: params should be preferred on overrides
description: "params" should be used on overridesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEconfusingWhy is this an issue?Overriding methods automatically inherit theparamsbehavior. To ease readability, this modifier should be explicitly used in the overriding method as well.Noncompliant code exampleclass Base { public virtual void Method(params int[] numbers) { ... } } class Derived : Base { public override void Method(int[] numbers) // Noncompliant, the params is missing.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Detects override methods that have array parameters but are missing the params keyword when the base method likely has params
logic.triggering_conditions: Method is an override AND has array parameter AND params keyword is missing
logic.exclusion_conditions: Test methods, methods with Assert/Console/Logger/Debug calls, generated code, methods already using params
logic.reasoning: Override methods should explicitly use the params modifier for array parameters to maintain readability and consistency with the base method's params behavior

should_trigger: public override void Method(int[] numbers) { /* implementation */ }
should_not_trigger: public override void Method(params int[] numbers) { /* implementation */ }
